codeExamples.title: Authenticate a User
codeExamples.description: Log a user in with email and password and receive a JWT token.

codeExamples.title: Create a Check
codeExamples.description: Create a new check and auto-increment its check number.

functions.name: loginUser
functions.description: Authenticates a user by email and password, returning a JWT token and sanitized user payload.

functions.name: createCheck
functions.description: Creates a new check record, ensuring the check number is assigned from the per-bank counter.

functions.name: getNextCheckNumber
functions.description: Retrieves and increments the next available check number for a given bank within a transaction.

classes.name: PdfGenerator
classes.description: Utility that renders check PDFs using bank and payee details.

props.name: banks
props.description: List of banks the current user can issue checks from.

props.name: onSubmit
props.description: Callback invoked when the user submits the form to create a new check.
